name: Star Dream Journey
short_description: Star Dream Trajectory - Chinese Style Agent "is a celebrity development interactive game. As a new agent in a celebrity artist agency, you will encounter four artists with different personalities that you will be responsible for in your career, and cultivate them into legends in the industry
detailed_description:
Star Dream Trajectory is a live action interactive movie game that cultivates celebrities. In this game, players will play as a new agent in a fictional actor agency. In the game, you will encounter four artists with different personalities that you will be responsible for in your career, and cultivate them into legends in the industry

Real person interactive video

The game has 4 artists with different personalities to cultivate, and nearly 300 live action videos interspersed in every aspect of daily arrangements, making every trip full of surprises

Strategic itinerary planning

Players need to arrange travel dates for 4 artists in the agency. The game provides nearly 60 types of travel arrangements, and how to balance training and work in a tight schedule will be the key! But also pay attention! Pay attention to balancing work and rest, and don't let artists get too tired!

Rich storyline

Players need to grow and make a name for themselves within a year. Based on the player's activity in each playthrough, each character will have 4 different plot endings waiting for players to discover. At the same time, there are 20 main storyline stories waiting for you to harvest emotions!

supported_languages: English, French, Italian, German, Spanish - Spain, Russian, Turkish, Japanese, Polish, Thai, Traditional Chinese, Korean, Simplified Chinese
